Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Eternal]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Eternal is a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Eternal is a ship with blazing red sails that sails on a wake of fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Eternal is an approaching entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Eternal is an Awakened ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Eternal is a location or vessel that a single Guard remains in while paddling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Eternal was waiting a day's trip out from the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Eternal is a ship with a main room.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Eternal drifts on a tide of flame rather than water.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — The Eternal is a ship that is approaching the current location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Eternal is a ship that would sink if dropped by the Lyathatan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Eternal was ripped to shreds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Eternal is a ship where a meeting of Guild Heads had previously occurred.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Eternal is a vessel that can be seaworthy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Eternal is expected to return to the water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Eternal is a ship located to the port of Calder's position.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Eternal is a rust-colored ship with bright red sails and golden lettering.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Eternal is a ship that burns water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Eternal is Cheska's ship.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
